name: E-commerce Launch Day Preparation
description: Pre-launch checklist validating backups, database, SSL, app config, and DNS before going live
prompts: List all backup schedules for project {{PROJECT_ID}} and verify daily backups are configured
Create a manual pre-launch backup for project {{PROJECT_ID}} with description 'Pre-Launch Backup {{RUN_ID}}' expiring in 7 days
Show me the MySQL database {{MYSQL_0_ID}} configuration including connection limits and performance settings
List all SSL certificates for project {{PROJECT_ID}} and verify they're valid for {{DOMAIN_0_FQDN}}
Get app {{APP_0_ID}} details to confirm Shopware version, runtime settings, and document root
